title: OpenArm follower calibration (CTR-CAL@v1)
description: Frozen on-disk calibration schema for one OpenArm follower arm. The joint zero itself lives in motor NV via 0xFE and is not represented here; motor_zero_raw is the readback witness and urdf_zero_offset the reference the residual is measured against (16 M-1, 02 FR-CON-064/065).

robot_type.description: Follower plugin type this calibration belongs to.

side.description: Which arm this calibration is for.

motor_zero_raw.description: Raw joint position (degrees) read back immediately after 0xFE, per motor (joint_1..joint_7, gripper). Residual-re-verify witness, not an applied offset.

urdf_zero_offset.description: Expected URDF-zero joint angle (degrees) per motor; the reference the residual is measured against. Required so limits and collision share one coordinate frame.

joint_scale.description: Degrees-per-unit scale per motor (1.0 unless a motor deviates).

gripper_open_rad.description: Gripper fully-open endpoint in radians (16 D-5).

gripper_close_rad.description: Gripper fully-closed endpoint in radians (16 D-5).

gripper_open_captured.description: Whether gripper_open_rad was captured from hardware (true) or seeded (false).

gripper_close_captured.description: Whether gripper_close_rad was captured from hardware (true) or seeded (false).

zero_method.description: How the mechanical zero reference was established (02 FR-CON-031/065).

zero_residual_deg.description: Per-motor residual (degrees) measured at set-zero time, or null before zeroing has run.

zero_power_cycle_verified.description: Whether 0xFE zero persistence across a power cycle was confirmed within tolerance (02 FR-CON-065 iii).

require_rezero_each_session.description: Whether every power session must explicitly re-zero. Conservative default true until persistence is confirmed.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of first creation.

last_updated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the last write.

last_zero_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the last successful set-zero.

checksum.description: sha256 hex over the canonical body excluding this field.
